reasoning: VIX at 27.37 (HIGH regime) but falling sharply (-9.88% overnight) signals fear unwinding and bullish compression. No macro events today clears the runway entirely. Strong overnight gap up +5.1 ($632.0 → $637.1) reflects significant bullish overnight sentiment; premarket has already pushed to 638.88 high (+$6.88 from prior close). Ribbon is BULL stack with 146-cent spread, aligned with directional momentum. Confidence moderates from 0.80+ due to VIX still in absolute HIGH territory (27.37) and mixed sector rotation (tech/energy showing weakness), but direction is unambiguously bullish.
key_observations: VIX fallen 9.88% overnight (fear unwinding) — strong bullish signal despite still-elevated absolute level
Zero macro events scheduled for 2026-03-31 — clear runway for directional trades all session
Significant overnight gap up +5.1 ($5 move = +0.79%) with premarket high at 638.88 (+1.09% from prior close) confirms bullish overnight sentiment
Ribbon BULL stack with healthy 146-cent spread aligns with gap-up momentum; ribbon spread ≥ 146¢ = tradeable directional structure
Mixed sector rotation (XLK -2.87%, XLE -1.85% from prior close) suggests some rotation out of high-beta tech, but financials (XLF) stable (+0.27%) — no crash signal
